indications.text:
MEPRON Suspension is indicated for the prevention of Pneumocystis carinii pneumonia in
patients who are intolerant to trimethoprim-sulfamethoxazole (TMP-SMX).
MEPRON Suspension is also indicated for the acute oral treatment of mild-to-moderate PCP in
patients who are intolerant to TMP-SMX.
Preventio...

1.1 Prevention of Pneumocystis jirovecii Pneumonia
MEPRON oral suspension is indicated for the prevention of Pneumocystis jirovecii pneumonia
(PCP) in adults and adolescents (aged 13 years and older) who cannot tolerate trimethoprim-
sulfamethoxazole (TMP-SMX).
